title: Job Opening Teacher at NIIT Foundation

jsonLd.title: Job Opening Teacher at NIIT Foundation
jsonLd.description:
Join the NIIT Foundation family as a Teacher in Mumbai. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About NIIT Foundation:
NIIT Foundation is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Educational Technology

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Life and accident insurance
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with NIIT Foundation!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
